# isAnimating

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the screen saver is animating.

## Declaration

```swift
var isAnimating: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

The value of this property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] when the screen saver is animating, and [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] when it isn’t.

## Animating the screen saver

- **startAnimation()**: Activates the periodic timer that animates the screen saver.
- **animateOneFrame()**: Advances the screen saver’s animation by a single frame.
- **stopAnimation()**: Deactivates the timer that advances the animation.
